api.secureArchitectureDesc: All WHMCS API calls are routed through internal proxy endpoints. The frontend never communicates directly with WHMCS.
api.endpointsDesc: These endpoints are used internally by the panel. When WHMCS is configured on the server, they proxy requests to the WHMCS API.

webHosting.headline: Lightning-Fast
webHosting.description: Launch your website with blazing-fast NVMe storage, free SSL, and built-in security. From personal blogs to business sites — we've got you covered.
webHosting.plansSubtitle: Powerful hosting for every website. All plans include free SSL, daily backups, and 24/7 support.
webHosting.whySubtitle: Premium features included with every plan.
webHosting.whatIsDesc: Web hosting is the home for your website. It stores your files on secure servers and makes your site accessible to visitors around the world, 24/7.
whatIsPoints: Store your website files, images, and databases securely
Keep your site online and accessible globally
Get professional email addresses with your domain
Scale resources as your website grows
webHosting.perfDesc: Our hosting is built for speed. NVMe storage, LiteSpeed servers, and smart caching make your site load in milliseconds — helping both user experience and search rankings.
perfPoints: NVMe SSDs deliver 10x faster speeds than standard storage
Global CDN for fast delivery worldwide
webHosting.secDesc: Security is essential — not optional. Every account is protected by multiple layers: DDoS protection, malware scanning, and free SSL certificates.
secPoints: Free SSL certificates for all domains
Automated daily backups with easy restore
webHosting.compareSubtitle: See exactly what's included in each plan to find your perfect match.
webHosting.crossSellDesc: Outgrowing shared hosting? Upgrade to VPS for dedicated resources, full root access, and unlimited scalability for demanding applications.
webHosting.faqSubtitle: Got questions about web hosting? We've got answers.
webHosting.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of website owners who trust Hoxta for reliable, fast, and secure web hosting.

vps.whatIsDesc: A Virtual Private Server gives you dedicated resources in a virtualized environment. Unlike shared hosting, your CPU, RAM, and storage are guaranteed — not affected by other users.
whatIsPoints: Full root access for complete control
Ideal for growing websites and apps
vps.perfDesc: Choose between Intel Xeon and AMD EPYC processors, both paired with NVMe storage for exceptional I/O.

Pure NVMe SSD storage for speed
vps.rootDesc: Take complete control of your server environment. Install any software, configure custom settings, and optimize for your specific workload.

vps.compareSubtitle: Choose the right VPS configuration for your needs.

features.nvmeRaidDesc: Hardware RAID with NVMe drives for speed and redundancy.

dedicated.whatIsDesc: A dedicated server gives you an entire physical machine just for you. Unlike VPS or shared hosting, you get 100% of the hardware with no virtualization — maximum performance and full control.

Maximum I/O with direct hardware access

reseller.headline: Start Your
reseller.description: Create and manage your own hosting company with our white-label reseller plans. Set your prices, keep 100% of profits, and let us handle the infrastructure.
reseller.plansSubtitle: Everything you need to run a professional hosting business. All plans include WHM, white-label branding, and 24/7 support.
reseller.whySubtitle: The complete toolkit for building and scaling your hosting business.
reseller.whatIsDesc: Reseller hosting lets you purchase hosting resources in bulk and resell them to your own clients under your brand. You manage clients through WHM while we handle all the infrastructure, security, and server management.
whatIsPoints: Purchase server resources at wholesale prices
Create and manage individual cPanel accounts for clients
Set your own pricing and billing terms
Full white-label branding with custom nameservers
reseller.scaleDesc: Start small and grow without limits. Our reseller plans scale seamlessly as you acquire more clients. Upgrade anytime without migration or downtime.
scalePoints: Easy upgrades as your client base grows
Integrated billing with optional WHMCS license
reseller.profitDesc: With low overhead costs and competitive wholesale pricing, reseller hosting offers excellent profit margins. You set the prices and keep 100% of what you charge.
profitPoints: Low startup costs, high profit potential
reseller.compareSubtitle: Find the perfect plan for your hosting business.

domains.popularSubtitle: Choose from the most popular domain extensions at unbeatable prices.
domains.includedSubtitle: Every domain comes with a complete package of premium features.
domains.whoisPrivacyDesc: Protect your personal data with free WHOIS privacy included on all domains.
domains.dnsManagementDesc: Complete DNS configuration with fast propagation and A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV support.
domains.easyTransferDesc: Transfer domains from other registrars quickly and without downtime. Full EPP support.
domains.freeSSLDesc: Free Let's Encrypt SSL certificate with every domain for maximum security.

domains.step1Desc: Enter your desired name in the search bar and check availability instantly.
domains.step2Desc: Select your preferred extension, add desired options, and customize DNS.
domains.step3Desc: Complete payment and your domain will be active in seconds.
domains.ctaSubtitle: Prices from just €2.99/year with free WHOIS privacy and SSL included.
domains.faq1Q: How do I register a domain?
domains.faq1A: Search for your desired domain in the search bar, select your preferred extension, and complete the order. The domain will be active in minutes.
domains.faq2Q: Can I transfer an existing domain?
domains.faq2A: Yes! We offer free transfers from any registrar. You just need the EPP/Auth code from your current registrar.
domains.faq3A: WHOIS Privacy protects your personal data (name, address, email) from the public WHOIS database. It's included free with all domains.
domains.faq4Q: How long does domain activation take?
domains.faq4A: New domains are activated instantly. For transfers, the process may take 5-7 days due to standard transfer procedures.
domains.faq5Q: Can I use the domain with another hosting?
domains.faq5A: Absolutely! The domain can be configured with any hosting provider through our advanced DNS management.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our DDoS protection services.

items.q: What is the difference between L3/L4 and L7 DDoS protection?
items.a: L3/L4 protection handles volumetric attacks targeting the network and transport layers (like SYN floods, UDP amplification). L7 protection focuses on application-layer attacks (like HTTP floods, Slowloris) that try to exhaust server resources. For complete coverage, we recommend both.

items.q: Do you support game-specific DDoS protection?
items.a: Yes! Our game server protection is optimized for popular titles including Minecraft, FiveM, Rust, ARK, and more. We use protocol-aware filtering that understands game traffic patterns to minimize false positives while blocking attacks.

items.q: Will DDoS mitigation add latency to my traffic?
items.a: Our always-on mitigation adds less than 1ms of latency in normal conditions. During active attacks, clean traffic is routed through our nearest scrubbing center with minimal impact. Most users experience no noticeable difference.

items.q: How do I onboard my infrastructure?
items.a: Onboarding is simple: 1) Sign up and configure your protected IPs in our dashboard. 2) Update your DNS or BGP routing to point to our network. 3) We'll provision your protection within minutes. Our team can assist with complex setups.

items.q: Do I need to change my DNS records?
items.a: For most setups, yes—you'll point your DNS to our protected IPs. For larger deployments, we support BGP-based routing where you announce your prefixes through our network. We provide detailed migration guides for both methods.

items.q: What kind of reports and analytics do I get?
items.a: You get real-time dashboards showing traffic patterns, attack vectors, blocked threats, and bandwidth usage. Historical reports are available for compliance. Enterprise plans include custom reporting and API access for integration with your monitoring tools.

items.q: Can I protect multiple IPs or entire subnets?
items.a: Absolutely. Standard plans protect 1 IP, Advanced protects 5 IPs, and Enterprise supports unlimited IPs including full /24 subnets or larger. Contact us for custom configurations covering your entire infrastructure.

items.q: What happens during a large-scale attack?
items.a: Our network automatically scales to absorb attacks up to 500+ Gbps. Traffic is distributed across multiple scrubbing centers. Enterprise customers have access to our 24/7 SOC team who actively monitor and tune mitigation in real-time.
Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. If you're not satisfied with our protection, contact support within 30 days for a full refund—no questions asked.

items.q: How quickly can I get started?
items.a: Protection can be active within minutes of signup. Simply configure your IPs in our dashboard, update your DNS, and you're protected. For complex enterprise setups, our onboarding team typically completes deployment within 24 hours.
